当地时间2026年1月8日，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在亚的斯亚贝巴非盟总部同非盟委员会主席优素福举行中国—非盟第九次战略对话。
王毅表示，非盟是引领非洲团结合作的“火车头”，在中非关系中地位重要、作用特殊。习近平主席连续13年向非盟峰会致贺电，充分表明中方对发展同非盟关系的高度重视。今年是中非开启外交关系70周年，也是中国外长连续第36年新年首访非洲。中方这一外交传统是对中非友谊的传承，体现对非政策稳定，展示发展中国家团结。中非28亿多人民团结奋斗，就能战胜任何困难挑战，加快共赴现代化步伐，并推动世界更加公平合理、更加和谐稳定。
王毅说，当前中非都处于发展关键时期，面临新的广阔合作机遇。中国愿以自身发展为包括非洲在内的广大发展中国家提供助力，携手实现现代化，共同维护全球南方利益。中非合作论坛为中非共同发展发挥了重要作用，走出了一条中非合作共赢之路。双方要继续用好这个平台，深化务实合作，共同讲好中非合作故事。双方要不断提升中国同非盟关系的战略性、示范性和实效性，推动非盟在中非关系全局中更好发挥引领作用。中方坚定支持非盟团结带领非洲国家坚持独立自主，捍卫非洲国家自主发展权利，支持非洲人以非洲方式解决非洲问题，走出符合自身国情的发展道路，支持非盟在地区事务中发挥主导作用。
王毅表示，非盟第一时间积极响应支持习近平主席提出的全球治理倡议，反映了双方理念高度认同和对塑造国际公平正义的共同心声。中方愿同非盟继续加强在四大全球倡议领域的对话交流，支持非洲在国际舞台发挥更大作用，共同践行真正的多边主义，推动建立更加公正合理的全球治理体系。
优素福表示，中国是非洲可以完全信赖和倚重的伙伴。中国外长连续36年新年首访非洲充分体现中国对非的战略重视。非中友好基于相互尊重和对和平发展的共同愿景，已成为全球南方合作的典范。非盟感激中国长期以来在各领域同非洲携手同行，对非洲发展给予无私支持，高度赞赏中非合作论坛取得的丰硕成果及为非中人民带来的实实在在福祉。非盟恪守一个中国原则，坚定支持中国在台湾问题上捍卫核心利益，反对任何分裂中国的行径。非盟愿同中方一道，继续通过中非合作论坛等机制密切非中合作，更好造福双方人民。
优素福说，非盟祝贺中方成功举办纪念中国人民抗日战争暨世界反法西斯战争胜利80周年活动。当前强权霸凌抬头、多边主义受到冲击，我们处于铭记历史、面向未来、捍卫主权的重要时刻，非中更有必要深化伙伴关系。非盟高度赞赏习近平主席提出的四大全球倡议，愿同中方携手维护全球南方共同利益，促进世界公平公正与和平发展。
english_translation:
On January 8, 2026, local time, Wang Yi, a member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and Minister of Foreign Affairs, held the ninth strategic dialogue between China and the African Union at the African Union headquarters in Addis Ababa with Moussa Faki Mahamat, Chairperson of the African Union Commission. Wang Yi stated that the African Union is the "locomotive" leading African unity and cooperation, playing an important and unique role in China-Africa relations. President Xi Jinping has sent congratulatory messages to the African Union Summit for 13 consecutive years, which fully demonstrates China's high regard for developing relations with the African Union. This year marks the 70th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations between China and Africa, and it is also the 36th consecutive year that the Chinese Foreign Minister has made Africa the first stop of the New Year visit. This diplomatic tradition reflects the inheritance of China-Africa friendship, embodies the stability of China's Africa policy, and showcases the unity of developing countries. The more than 2.8 billion people of China and Africa, united in their efforts, can overcome any difficulties and challenges, accelerate the pace towards modernization, and promote a more equitable, reasonable, harmonious, and stable world.

Wang Yi said that both China and Africa are currently at a critical period of development, facing new and broad cooperation opportunities. China is willing to provide support for the development of a wide range of developing countries, including Africa, to achieve modernization together and jointly safeguard the interests of the Global South. The Forum on China-Africa Cooperation has played an important role in the common development of China and Africa, paving a path of win-win cooperation. Both sides should continue to make good use of this platform, deepen practical cooperation, and tell the story of China-Africa cooperation well. Both sides should continuously enhance the strategic, exemplary, and effective nature of China-Africa relations, and promote the African Union to play a better leading role in the overall context of China-Africa relations. China firmly supports the African Union in uniting and leading African countries to uphold independence and autonomy, defend the rights of African countries to develop independently, support Africans in solving African problems in African ways, and follow a development path that suits their national conditions, as well as support the African Union in playing a leading role in regional affairs.

Wang Yi expressed that the African Union responded positively and promptly to support the global governance initiative proposed by President Xi Jinping, reflecting a high degree of alignment in both sides' concepts and a shared voice in shaping international fairness and justice. China is willing to continue strengthening dialogue and communication with the African Union in the four major global initiative areas, support Africa in playing a greater role on the international stage, jointly practice true multilateralism, and promote the establishment of a more just and reasonable global governance system.

Moussa Faki Mahamat stated that China is a partner that Africa can fully trust and rely on. The fact that the Chinese Foreign Minister has made Africa the first stop of the New Year visit for 36 consecutive years fully reflects China's strategic importance attached to Africa. The friendship between Africa and China, based on mutual respect and a shared vision for peaceful development, has become a model for cooperation among the Global South. The African Union appreciates China's long-standing support for Africa's development in various fields and highly values the fruitful results of the Forum on China-Africa Cooperation and the tangible benefits it has brought to the peoples of both China and Africa. The African Union adheres to the One China principle, firmly supports China in defending its core interests on the Taiwan issue, and opposes any actions that seek to divide China. The African Union is willing to work with China to continue to closely cooperate through mechanisms such as the Forum on China-Africa Cooperation to better benefit the peoples of both sides.

Moussa Faki Mahamat congratulated China on successfully hosting the activities commemorating the 80th anniversary of the victory of the Chinese People's War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression and the World Anti-Fascist War. In the current context of rising power bullying and challenges to multilateralism, we are at an important moment of remembering history, looking to the future, and defending sovereignty, making it even more necessary for Africa and China to deepen their partnership. The African Union highly appreciates the four major global initiatives proposed by President Xi Jinping and is willing to work hand in hand with China to safeguard the common interests of the Global South and promote fairness, justice, and peaceful development in the world.

title: State Council Approves Implementation Plan for Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart
description: The State Council has approved the 'Implementation Plan for Accelerating Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart' to enhance ecological safety, promote green industries, and improve living conditions in the region.

key_points.details: The Plan emphasizes ecological safety and resilience, aiming to enhance the ecological environment and quality in the Chang-Zhu-Tan area.
It promotes the development of ecological industries and the green transformation of existing industries, aligning with the Alternative Fuels and Renewable Energy Equipment sectors.
The initiative fosters regional collaboration and integrated development, ensuring that urban and rural areas benefit from green infrastructure improvements.

full_content.analysis: The 'Implementation Plan for Accelerating Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart' represents a significant step towards sustainable urban development in Hunan Province. By prioritizing ecological safety, the Plan aims to enhance the region's environmental quality while fostering industrial growth in alternative fuels and renewable energy. The integration of urban and rural areas through improved green infrastructure is expected to promote a higher quality of life for residents. Furthermore, the focus on regional collaboration and innovative practices will likely position the Chang-Zhu-Tan area as a model for ecological transformation, aligning with national sustainability goals and enhancing economic resilience.

chinese_original:
长株潭生态绿心位于湖南省长沙、株洲、湘潭三市交汇地带，涵盖各类自然要素，承载生态、生产、生活和安全韧性、区域融合等多元功能，是长株潭都市圈的生态枢纽和融城中心。为支持长株潭生态绿心（以下简称“绿心”）探索绿色转型发展新模式，经国务院同意，近日，国家发展改革委印发《长株潭生态绿心加快绿色转型发展实施方案》（发改环资〔2025〕1751号，以下简称《方案》）。
《方案》以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，坚持生态优先、绿色筑底，有序发展、创新提质，一体联动、区域融合，深化改革、制度创新，严守国土空间规划底线管控要求，建设高度城市化地区的生态安全屏障、因地制宜发展新质生产力的研发创新基地、城乡融合宜居宜游的美丽幸福花园，推动长株潭生态绿心加快绿色转型发展，确定了4方面11项重点任务：一是统筹生态与安全，厚植绿心绿色底色，包括改善绿心生态环境、提升绿心生态品质、增强绿心安全韧性等。二是统筹生态与生产，强化绿心产业支撑，包括大力发展生态产业、加快产业绿色转型等。三是统筹生态与生活，促进绿心提质惠民，包括完善绿色基础设施、推动城乡绿色发展、推广绿色生活方式等。四是探索绿色转型发展新模式，包括强化区域协同、健全生态产品价值实现机制、完善要素保障制度等。
《方案》要求，湖南省人民政府切实承担主体责任，加强对长株潭生态绿心加快绿色转型发展的组织领导，细化政策措施，压实工作责任，确保各项任务落实落地，高标准、高质量推进绿心保护发展。国务院有关部门按照职责分工抓好任务落实，根据国家有关规定，加大对长株潭生态绿心加快绿色转型发展的指导支持力度，跟踪调度本方案实施进展情况，帮助地方协调解决遇到的困难和问题。
english_translation:
The Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart is located at the junction of Changsha, Zhuzhou, and Xiangtan cities in Hunan Province. It encompasses various natural elements and supports multiple functions such as ecology, production, living, safety resilience, and regional integration. It serves as the ecological hub and integration center of the Chang-Zhu-Tan metropolitan area. To support the exploration of new models for green transformation and development in the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart (hereinafter referred to as the "Green Heart"), the State Council has approved the issuance of the "Implementation Plan for Accelerating Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart" (Document No. [2025] 1751 of the National Development and Reform Commission, hereinafter referred to as the "Plan").

The Plan is guided by Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, adhering to the principles of prioritizing ecology, establishing a green foundation, promoting orderly development and innovation-driven quality enhancement, fostering integrated coordination and regional integration, deepening reforms and institutional innovation, and strictly adhering to the bottom-line control requirements of land and space planning. It aims to build an ecological safety barrier in highly urbanized areas, develop research and innovation bases for new productive forces suited to local conditions, and create a beautiful and livable garden that integrates urban and rural areas, thereby accelerating the green transformation and development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart. The Plan identifies 11 key tasks in four areas: 

1. Coordinating ecology and safety to enhance the green foundation of the Green Heart, including improving the ecological environment, enhancing ecological quality, and strengthening safety resilience.
2. Coordinating ecology and production to reinforce industrial support for the Green Heart, including vigorously developing ecological industries and accelerating the green transformation of industries.
3. Coordinating ecology and living to promote quality improvement and benefits for the people in the Green Heart, including improving green infrastructure, promoting green development in urban and rural areas, and advocating for green lifestyles.
4. Exploring new models for green transformation and development, including strengthening regional collaboration, improving the mechanism for realizing the value of ecological products, and enhancing the system for ensuring resource factors.

The Plan requires the Hunan Provincial People's Government to earnestly assume the main responsibility, strengthen organizational leadership for accelerating the green transformation and development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart, refine policy measures, enforce work responsibilities, and ensure the implementation of various tasks, promoting the protection and development of the Green Heart to high standards and quality. Relevant departments of the State Council shall implement tasks according to their responsibilities, increase guidance and support for the green transformation and development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart in accordance with national regulations, track the progress of the implementation of this Plan, and assist localities in coordinating and resolving difficulties and issues encountered.

impact_analysis.details: The Plan's focus on ecological industries is likely to boost the development and adoption of alternative fuels in the Chang-Zhu-Tan region.
The initiative will drive sustainable construction practices, enhancing green infrastructure and promoting eco-friendly building methods.
The emphasis on green transformation will likely increase demand for renewable energy equipment, supporting local innovation and production.

title: Hainan Regulatory Bureau Implements Enhanced Budget Supervision Measures
description: The Hainan Regulatory Bureau strengthens budget supervision by enhancing political capacity, revising internal controls, and focusing on core responsibilities. It emphasizes full-process supervision, financial discipline, and problem rectification while optimizing regulatory methods and service measures to improve departmental budget management.

key_points.details: The Hainan Regulatory Bureau emphasizes enhancing political capacity and institutional mechanisms to improve departmental budget supervision.
The bureau aims to enforce financial discipline through rigorous supervision of budget preparation and execution, addressing violations effectively.
Innovative regulatory methods and collaborative efforts are prioritized to enhance the quality and effectiveness of budget management in Hainan.

full_content.analysis: The Hainan Regulatory Bureau's recent policy outlines a comprehensive approach to enhancing departmental budget supervision by focusing on strengthening political capacity, enforcing financial discipline, and optimizing regulatory methods. By prioritizing political construction and institutional mechanisms, the bureau aims to improve the effectiveness of budget management. The emphasis on rigorous supervision and problem rectification reflects a commitment to financial integrity and accountability. Furthermore, the integration of innovative regulatory methods and collaborative efforts signifies a proactive approach to addressing challenges in budget execution. This policy not only aims to enhance the quality of financial oversight but also seeks to align with broader national objectives, ensuring that Hainan's financial practices contribute to sustainable development.

chinese_original:
2026年1月9日 来源：财政部海南监管局
海南监管局坚持以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻财政部党组决策部署，锚定“加强、聚焦、优化”工作方针，深耕主业、精准发力，强根基、聚主业、优举措，扎实提升部门预算监管效能。
一、强根基、提能力，厚植履职尽责底气
始终把“加强”作为履职之基、成事之本，立足部门预算监管职责，强化政治能力建设、制度机制建设、履职能力建设。一是加强政治建设铸魂领航，把准监管正确方向。坚持把党的政治建设摆在首位，深入学习贯彻习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想，全面贯彻落实党的二十大和二十届历次全会精神，常态化开展政治理论学习与党性教育，不断提升干部政治判断力、政治领悟力、政治执行力。始终牢记“国之大者”，深刻把握财政监管政治属性，将落实过紧日子要求、严肃财经纪律、强化部门预算监管等中心工作，融入服务发展大局中谋划推进，确保各项工作始终沿着正确政治方向稳步前行。二是加强制度建设提质固本，健全规范监管机制。结合监管业务实际，修订中央驻琼预算单位部门预算执行监管、内部控制报告编报情况分析等3项内部控制操作规程，明确监管流程、操作标准、责任分工，实现“业务有规程、环节有标准”。持续加强监管工作风险防控，构建审核小组复核、业务骨干初审、处室负责人复审、重要事项经局复核组审理、局领导终审等多重审核机制，形成层层把关、环环相扣的审核链条。三是加强履职能力锤炼赋能，夯实监管业务根基。立足新时代财政监管工作要求，聚焦预算管理、财会监督等核心业务，常态化开展业务培训、岗位练兵和专题研讨，引导干部吃透政策、精通业务、善作善成。坚持学用结合、以干促学，把日常监管、专项核查、调研走访作为锤炼本领的主战场，不断提升人员精准监管的实战能力，着力打造政治过硬、业务精湛、作风优良的高素质监管队伍。
二、聚主业、盯重点，彰显精准监管实效
牢牢把握“聚焦”核心要义，紧扣主责主业，围绕核心领域、关键环节、重点任务，聚焦严把过程监管、抓实财会监督、推进问题整改，推动部门预算监管效能全面提升。一是聚焦全流程监管，严把预算管控关口。紧扣预算编制、执行、决算全链条，持续提升预算监管规范化、精细化水平。加强事前把关，认真做好2026年“一上”预算编制审核工作，切实提升部门预算编制质量。加强事中监管，构建线上全覆盖监控+线下抽查核实、专项核查的联动监管机制，发现问题及时预警纠偏，持续推进部门预算执行常态化监督。加强事后审核，以开展2024年度部门决算审核为抓手，严把决算审核闭环关，推动部门决算编报质量提升和相关问题整改。二是聚焦财会监督主责，严肃财经纪律。坚持把财会监督作为核心抓手，常态化、制度化推进监督核查工作。抓实财经纪律重点问题专项检查，根据财政部统一部署安排，瞄准中央驻琼预算单位核心财经行为，突出重点、查深查透，着力发现相关单位在预算编制、预算执行、资金管理、资产管理等方面存在的问题，坚决查处预算支出中违反财经纪律的违规行为，深挖预算编制上不合理的惯性安排，并结合查处问题情况形成典型案例，进一步严肃财经纪律，有力推动党中央决策部署落地见效。三是聚焦闭环管理，推进问题整改。综合运用及时提醒、预警、通报等多种形式，有效推动问题整改。构建问题整改台账销号管理机制，对可立行立改的问题，精准施策、即时纠偏，督促相关单位边查边改、立查立改；对需长期推进、持续发力的问题，细化整改举措，明确时间节点，跟踪督导、攻坚突破，确保问题切实解决。统筹推进“当下改”与“长久立”，扎实做好问题整改“后半篇文章”，推动预算单位健全完善规章制度27项，切实把部门预算监督成果转化为制度规范，实现以查促改、以改促优的良性循环。
三、优举措、聚合力，激活监管发展动能
紧扣“优化”工作要求，坚持守正创新、提质增效，持续优化监管方式、服务举措、调查研究，以优质的部门预算监管赋能高质量发展。一是优化监管方式，提升整体效能。通过召开中央驻琼部门预算监管工作会议，通报中央驻琼预算单位2025年上半年部门预算监督有关情况、1-7月预算执行情况等方式，梳理通报发现的主要问题，提出进一步加强部门预算管理的意见，凝聚思想共识，提升中央驻琼预算单位部门预算监管质效。坚持问题导向、分类施策，针对不同领域、不同单位的监管特点，优化核查方式、细化监管举措，做到精准甄别问题、精准施策整改。二是优化服务理念，凝聚工作合力。秉持“监督与服务并重”理念，对标预算执行常态化监督新要求，主动向被监管单位及经办人员开展政策解读与制度宣讲，切实增强相关单位预算管理意识。以党建联动搭建常态化沟通桥梁，通过主题党日、专题联学与研讨交流等多种方式，凝聚监管工作合力，共同提升预算管理标准化、专业化水平。三是优化调研联动，积极发挥参谋作用。把调查研究作为优化监管、服务发展的重要抓手，立足监管职能使命，开展海南自贸港加工增值免关税政策实施、文昌航天旅游等多项调研，总结政策落实情况和成效，查找剖析问题、提出政策建议，为相关政策完善发挥参谋作用，以调研实效助推监管工作提质增效。
english_translation:
January 9, 2026 Source: Hainan Regulatory Bureau of the Ministry of Finance  
The Hainan Regulatory Bureau adheres to Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era as its guiding principle, deeply implements the decisions and deployments of the Party Leadership Group of the Ministry of Finance, and anchors its work policy of "strengthening, focusing, and optimizing." It diligently cultivates its main business, applies precise efforts, strengthens its foundation, concentrates on its core responsibilities, and optimizes its measures to effectively enhance the efficiency of departmental budget supervision.  
I. Strengthening the Foundation and Enhancing Capacity to Build Confidence in Responsibilities  
Always regard "strengthening" as the foundation of duty performance and the essence of achieving results. Based on the responsibilities of departmental budget supervision, it strengthens political capacity building, institutional mechanism construction, and duty performance capability enhancement. First, strengthen political construction to forge the soul and guide the direction of supervision, ensuring the correct direction of supervision. It insists on placing the Party's political construction at the forefront, deeply studying and implementing Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, fully implementing the spirit of the 20th National Congress of the Communist Party of China and the subsequent plenary sessions, and regularly conducting political theory learning and Party character education to continuously enhance the political judgment, political understanding, and political execution capabilities of cadres. It always keeps in mind the "major issues of the nation," deeply understands the political nature of financial supervision, and integrates the central tasks of implementing frugality, enforcing financial discipline, and strengthening departmental budget supervision into the overall development service, ensuring that all work steadily progresses in the correct political direction. Second, strengthen institutional construction to improve quality and solidify the foundation, and improve the regulatory mechanism. In line with the actual supervision business, it revises three internal control operational procedures related to the supervision of departmental budget execution and internal control report preparation for central units stationed in Hainan, clarifying regulatory processes, operational standards, and responsibility divisions to achieve "business has procedures, and links have standards." It continuously strengthens risk prevention and control in supervision work, establishing a multi-layered review mechanism involving review groups, preliminary reviews by key personnel, re-examinations by department heads, reviews of important matters by the bureau's review group, and final reviews by bureau leaders, forming a comprehensive review chain. Third, strengthen the training and empowerment of duty performance capabilities to solidify the foundation of regulatory business. Based on the requirements of financial supervision in the new era, it focuses on core businesses such as budget management and financial accounting supervision, regularly conducting business training, job drills, and thematic discussions to guide cadres in thoroughly understanding policies, mastering business, and achieving results. It insists on combining learning with application, promoting learning through practice, and using daily supervision, special inspections, and research visits as the main battleground for honing skills, continuously enhancing personnel's practical capabilities for precise supervision, and striving to build a high-quality regulatory team with strong political integrity, excellent business skills, and good work style.  
II. Focusing on Core Responsibilities and Key Tasks to Demonstrate Effective Supervision  
Firmly grasping the core essence of "focusing," it closely adheres to its main responsibilities and core tasks, concentrating on key areas, critical links, and important tasks, focusing on strict process supervision, solid financial accounting supervision, and promoting problem rectification to comprehensively enhance the effectiveness of departmental budget supervision. First, focus on full-process supervision and strictly control budget management. It closely follows the entire chain of budget preparation, execution, and final accounts, continuously improving the standardization and refinement of budget supervision. It strengthens pre-approval, carefully conducting the review of the 2026 "first draft" budget preparation to effectively enhance the quality of departmental budget preparation. It strengthens in-process supervision by establishing a joint regulatory mechanism of online comprehensive monitoring plus offline random checks and special inspections, promptly warning and correcting issues, and continuously promoting the normalization of departmental budget execution supervision. It strengthens post-review by using the review of the 2024 departmental final accounts as a starting point, strictly controlling the closure of the final accounts review loop, promoting the improvement of the quality of departmental final accounts preparation and rectification of related issues. Second, focus on the main responsibility of financial accounting supervision and enforce financial discipline. It insists on treating financial accounting supervision as a core tool, regularly and systemically advancing supervision and inspection work. It addresses key issues of financial discipline through special inspections, targeting core financial behaviors of central units stationed in Hainan according to the unified deployment of the Ministry of Finance, highlighting key points, and conducting in-depth investigations to identify issues in budget preparation, execution, fund management, and asset management, resolutely investigating violations of financial discipline in budget expenditures, deeply exploring unreasonable habitual arrangements in budget preparation, and forming typical cases based on the investigation results to further enforce financial discipline and effectively promote the implementation of the decisions and deployments of the Party Central Committee. Third, focus on closed-loop management and promote problem rectification. It comprehensively utilizes timely reminders, warnings, and notifications to effectively promote problem rectification. It establishes a problem rectification ledger management mechanism, implementing precise measures and immediate corrections for issues that can be resolved quickly, urging relevant units to rectify issues as they are identified; for issues requiring long-term promotion and sustained efforts, it refines rectification measures, clarifies timelines, and tracks supervision to ensure effective resolution of problems. It coordinates the promotion of "immediate rectification" and "long-term establishment," solidly addressing the "second half" of problem rectification, promoting budget units to improve and perfect 27 regulations, and effectively transforming the results of departmental budget supervision into institutional norms, achieving a virtuous cycle of promoting rectification through investigation and enhancing quality through rectification.  
III. Optimizing Measures and Gathering Strength to Activate Regulatory Development Momentum  
Closely adhering to the work requirement of "optimizing," it insists on maintaining integrity while innovating, enhancing quality and efficiency, and continuously optimizing regulatory methods, service measures, and research to empower high-quality development through quality departmental budget supervision. First, optimize regulatory methods to enhance overall effectiveness. By holding a work meeting on departmental budget supervision for central units stationed in Hainan, reporting on the budget supervision situation for the first half of 2025 and the budget execution situation from January to July, it identifies and reports major issues found, proposes further opinions on strengthening departmental budget management, builds consensus, and enhances the quality and effectiveness of departmental budget supervision for central units stationed in Hainan. It adheres to a problem-oriented approach and implements differentiated measures, optimizing inspection methods and refining regulatory measures according to the characteristics of different fields and units to achieve precise identification of issues and precise rectification measures. Second, optimize service concepts to gather collaborative efforts. Upholding the principle of "supervision and service being equally important," it aligns with the new requirements for the normalization of budget execution supervision, proactively providing policy interpretation and institutional promotion to the supervised units and personnel to effectively enhance their awareness of budget management. It builds a regular communication bridge through Party-building initiatives, using various methods such as themed Party days, special joint learning, and discussion exchanges to gather collaborative efforts in regulatory work and jointly enhance the standardization and professionalism of budget management. Third, optimize research collaboration to actively play an advisory role. It regards research as an important tool for optimizing supervision and serving development, based on its regulatory functions and missions, conducting multiple studies on the implementation of the duty-free policy for processing and value-added in the Hainan Free Trade Port, and on Wenchang space tourism, summarizing policy implementation situations and effects, identifying and analyzing issues, and proposing policy recommendations to play an advisory role in the improvement of related policies, using research effectiveness to promote the enhancement of regulatory work quality and efficiency.

title: Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Work Conference Held in Fuzhou
description: The Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Work Conference reviewed progress since 2025, set key tasks for 2026, and emphasized high-quality economic and social development aligned with national strategies.

key_points.details: The Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Conference emphasizes high-quality economic growth and the implementation of the 14th Five-Year Plan.
The conference highlights the importance of investment management and innovation to foster emerging industries and enhance economic resilience.
Key tasks include ensuring social stability and addressing livelihood issues, particularly during the Spring Festival, to maintain harmony.

full_content.analysis: The Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Work Conference outlines a strategic framework for economic and social development, emphasizing the implementation of the 14th Five-Year Plan. It highlights the need for high-quality growth, investment management, and innovation to foster emerging industries. The conference also addresses social stability, particularly in light of the upcoming Spring Festival, ensuring that key projects are completed and livelihood issues are prioritized. By aligning with the directives of the Party Central Committee, Fujian aims to enhance its economic resilience and promote a harmonious society, reflecting the broader goals of Chinese-style modernization.

chinese_original:
12月26日，福建省发展改革工作会议在福州召开。会议坚持以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，全面贯彻落实党的二十大和二十届历次全会精神，深入贯彻习近平总书记在福建考察时的重要讲话精神，认真落实中央经济工作会议及全国发展和改革工作会议、福建省委经济工作会议部署，总结2025年以来发展改革工作的新进展新成绩，高质量编制实施“十五五”规划，研究部署2026年发展改革重点任务，推动“十五五”时期经济社会高质量发展开好局、起好步。福建省发展改革委党组书记、主任孟芊作工作报告。
会议指出，今年是很不平凡的一年，在以习近平同志为核心的党中央坚强领导下，全省经济社会发展呈现总体平稳、稳中有进的良好态势，实现质的有效提升和量的合理增长。全省发展改革系统坚决贯彻落实党中央、国务院决策部署和福建省委、省政府工作要求，坚持扭住目标不放松、一张蓝图绘到底，紧盯“奋勇争先、再上台阶”，履职尽责、担当作为，扎实推动各项工作。一是做好经济分析和政策研究，开展周监测、月分析、季调度，主动引导社会预期，强化宏观政策取向一致性评估，确保各项政策同向发力。二是抓好中长期规划和年度计划，起草我省“十五五”规划《纲要》，指导市县科学开展规划编制，高质量编制实施国民经济和社会发展年度计划。三是加强投资管理和项目建设，积极争取并用好各类政策性资金，推进重大项目和标志性工程建设。四是推进改革和创新，主动融入全国统一大市场建设，深入开展市场准入壁垒清理整治行动和招标投标领域突出问题系统整治，福厦泉要素市场化配置综合改革试点获国务院批复，推进实施新时代民营经济强省战略，推动出台《福建省民营经济促进条例》，国家生态文明试验区建设持续深化，高质量建设两岸融合发展示范区，“海丝”核心区建设加快推进。五是强化综合统筹和综合平衡，做深做实新时代山海协作，开展省级首批9个城乡融合试点和国家10个新型城镇化潜力地区试点，加快革命老区振兴发展，扎实做好援藏援疆工作，深化拓展闽宁协作，推进“海上福建”建设，强化粮食、能源、产业链供应链、数据等领域安全保障，持续优化基本公共服务。
会议强调，要深刻领会习近平总书记在中央经济工作会议上提出“五个必须”的重要内涵，自觉把思想和行动统一到党中央、省委对形势的科学判断上来，准确把握明年经济工作的要求，自觉做到“两个更好统筹”，锚定目标、接续奋斗，扎实做好明年经济工作。
一是高质量编制实施“十五五”规划。深入领会党中央战略意图和省委部署，坚持因地制宜，高质量编制好“十五五”。推进建立健全省规划纲要与省级专项规划、市县规划衔接的机制，做好衔接指导。开展多层次、多渠道的宣传解读工作，确保规划内容项目化、清单化、责任化落实，健全规划监测实施机制，提升规划管理科学化水平，切实抓好规划实施工作。加强经济形势分析研判，完善政策工具箱，强化预期管理，推动实现良好开局。
二是加快推进现代化产业体系建设。深入整治重点行业“内卷式”竞争和培育增长新动能。培育壮大新兴产业和未来产业，强化场景示范引领，抓好产业集群发展，完善低空经济产业生态。持续深化数智赋能千行百业，深入实施“人工智能+”行动，做大做强做优数字经济，提升数字治理质量效益。
三是坚定不移实施扩大内需战略。把稳投资作为工作的重中之重来抓，扎实做好“十五五”规划重大项目谋划、储备、实施工作，力促“两重”、中央预算内投资、地方政府专项债、新型政策性金融工具等政策性资金项目加快建设，推动从“投资于物”到“投资于人”，提升投资效率，激发民间投资活力。更大力度提振消费，优化实施消费品以旧换新政策，促进服务消费提质扩容惠民，加快推动放宽消费不合理限制，推动消费供给提质升级。
四是进一步全面深化改革扩大对外开放。纵深推进融入全国统一大市场建设，加大壁垒破除力度，协同推进“准入、场景、要素”一体化改革。加快打造一流营商环境，规范招商引资行为，深化招标投标领域突出问题系统整治。促进民营经济健康发展，贯彻实施民营经济促进法，健全涉企执法等长效机制，持续提振发展信心。稳步扩大制度型开放，稳定外贸外资基本盘，统筹推动“海丝”核心区高质量发展。
五是加快建设两岸融合发展示范区。完善闽台融合政策机制，优化产业布局，深化经贸合作，推动闽台产业合作共赢，支持重点区域率先融合，探索建设两岸共同市场先行区域，构建全域融合发展新格局。
六是推动区域协调发展和城乡融合发展。纵深推进新时代山海协作，加快革命老区振兴发展，扎实做好援藏援疆工作，深化拓展闽宁协作。稳步推进新型城镇化建设，推进省级城乡融合试点工作，加快实施新型城镇化战略，持续发展壮大县域经济。建设更高水平“海上福建”，做强做优做大海洋产业，抓好福州、厦门全国海洋经济发展示范区建设，提升“数字海洋”建设水平。
七是加快经济社会发展全面绿色转型。稳步实施碳排放总量和强度双控制度，支持国家级、省级碳达峰试点建设，加快培育建设一批零碳园区。深化生态文明体制改革创新，持续深化5个省级生态产品价值实现试点建设，健全废弃物循环利用体系，持续加大生态文明宣传力度。
八是持续加大保障和改善民生力度。切实抓好稳就业工作，加强与主要劳务输入地的工作协同，强化新就业形态劳动者就业服务和权益保障。强化价格改革民生导向，加强分析研判CPI、PPI运行态势，持续推进公用事业价格改革，兜紧兜牢民生价格底线。
九是适应人口形势变化优化公共资源配置。统筹谋划推动人口高质量发展，加快完善适应人口变化的公共资源配置机制，加强教育资源前瞻布局。
十是统筹高质量发展和高水平安全。更加注重统筹发展和安全，持续提高粮食安全保障能力，扎实做好能源要素保障，提升产业链供应链韧性，加强国防动员能力建设。
会议要求，要做好岁末年初重点工作，抓好安全生产，紧盯重点领域、重点行业，强化重大事故隐患排查治理和安全风险防范化解，压紧压实各方责任链条，筑牢坚实安全屏障。抓好重点项目收官，保障重要民生商品特别是生活必需品量足价稳。组织协调做好春运工作，处理好农民工欠薪、拖欠企业账款等问题，维护社会和谐稳定，确保度过平安、廉洁、祥和的佳节。
会议要求，全省发展改革系统要更加紧密地团结在以习近平同志为核心的党中央周围，深入学习贯彻习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想，坚决抓好习近平总书记重要讲话重要指示批示精神落地落实，以实际行动坚定拥护“两个确立”、坚决做到“两个维护”。要深刻领会党中央战略意图和省委、省政府工作要求，树立和践行正确政绩观，巩固拓展深入贯彻中央八项规定精神学习教育成果，推进作风建设常态化长效化，锐意进取、开拓创新，扭住目标不放松，一张蓝图绘到底，开拓全省发展改革工作新局面，为奋力推进中国式现代化福建实践作出新的更大贡献。
福建省发展改革委党组成员、厅级领导，总规划师，驻委纪检监察组，福建省发展改革委机关各处室和所属单位相关负责同志，各设区市发展改革委、平潭综合实验区经济发展局主要负责同志和综合处（科）、规划处（科）、投资处（科）主要负责人，以及部分地市工信、农业农村、粮食和物资储备、数据管理等部门有关负责同志参加会议。
english_translation:
On December 26, the Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Work Conference was held in Fuzhou. The conference adhered to the guidance of Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, fully implemented the spirit of the 20th National Congress of the Communist Party of China and the successive plenary sessions of the 20th Central Committee, deeply carried out the important speech of General Secretary Xi Jinping during his inspection in Fujian, and earnestly implemented the deployments of the Central Economic Work Conference, the National Development and Reform Work Conference, and the Fujian Provincial Party Committee Economic Work Conference. It summarized the new progress and achievements in development and reform work since 2025, high-quality formulated and implemented the 14th Five-Year Plan, studied and deployed the key tasks for development and reform in 2026, and promoted a good start and step for high-quality economic and social development during the 14th Five-Year period. Meng Qian, Secretary of the Party Leadership Group and Director of the Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Commission, delivered a work report.

The conference pointed out that this year has been extraordinary. Under the strong leadership of the Party Central Committee with Comrade Xi Jinping at its core, the overall economic and social development of the province has shown a stable and progressive trend, achieving effective qualitative improvement and reasonable quantitative growth. The development and reform system of the province resolutely implemented the decisions and deployments of the Party Central Committee and the State Council, as well as the work requirements of the Fujian Provincial Party Committee and Provincial Government, adhered to the goal without relaxation, maintained a consistent blueprint, focused on "striving to be the best and reaching new heights," fulfilled responsibilities, and solidly promoted various tasks. First, conduct economic analysis and policy research, carry out weekly monitoring, monthly analysis, and quarterly scheduling, proactively guide social expectations, strengthen the consistency assessment of macro policy orientation, and ensure that various policies work in the same direction. Second, focus on medium- and long-term planning and annual plans, draft the "14th Five-Year Plan" Outline for our province, guide cities and counties to scientifically carry out planning compilation, and high-quality formulate and implement the annual plan for national economic and social development. Third, strengthen investment management and project construction, actively strive for and effectively utilize various policy funds, and promote the construction of major projects and landmark projects. Fourth, promote reform and innovation, actively integrate into the construction of a national unified market, deeply carry out actions to clear and rectify market access barriers and systematically address prominent issues in the bidding field, with the pilot reform of market-oriented allocation of factors in Fuzhou, Xiamen, and Quanzhou approved by the State Council, promote the implementation of the strategy for a strong private economy in the new era, and push for the introduction of the "Fujian Province Private Economy Promotion Regulations." The construction of the National Ecological Civilization Experimental Zone continues to deepen, high-quality construction of the cross-strait integrated development demonstration zone is accelerated, and the construction of the "Maritime Silk Road" core area is advancing rapidly. Fifth, strengthen comprehensive coordination and balance, deepen the cooperation between mountains and seas in the new era, carry out the first batch of nine urban-rural integration pilots at the provincial level and ten new-type urbanization potential area pilots at the national level, accelerate the revitalization and development of revolutionary old areas, solidly carry out assistance work for Tibet and Xinjiang, deepen and expand the cooperation between Fujian and Ningxia, promote the construction of "Maritime Fujian," and strengthen security guarantees in areas such as food, energy, industrial chain, supply chain, and data, continuously optimize basic public services.

The conference emphasized the need to deeply understand the important connotation of the "five musts" proposed by General Secretary Xi Jinping at the Central Economic Work Conference, consciously unify thoughts and actions with the scientific judgment of the situation made by the Party Central Committee and the Provincial Party Committee, accurately grasp the requirements for next year's economic work, consciously achieve "two better coordination," anchor goals, continue to strive, and solidly carry out next year's economic work.

First, high-quality formulate and implement the "14th Five-Year Plan." Deeply understand the strategic intentions of the Party Central Committee and the deployments of the Provincial Party Committee, adhere to local conditions, and high-quality formulate the "14th Five-Year Plan." Promote the establishment and improvement of mechanisms for the connection between provincial planning outlines and provincial special plans, as well as city and county planning, and provide guidance for the connection. Carry out multi-level and multi-channel publicity and interpretation work to ensure that the planning content is project-based, itemized, and responsibility-oriented, improve the planning monitoring and implementation mechanism, enhance the scientific level of planning management, and effectively grasp the implementation of planning work. Strengthen economic situation analysis and judgment, improve the policy toolbox, enhance expectation management, and promote a good start.

Second, accelerate the construction of a modern industrial system. Deeply rectify "involution" competition in key industries and cultivate new growth momentum. Foster and expand emerging industries and future industries, strengthen scenario demonstration leadership, promote the development of industrial clusters, and improve the low-altitude economy industrial ecosystem. Continuously deepen digital intelligence empowerment across various sectors, deeply implement the "Artificial Intelligence +" initiative, expand and enhance the digital economy, and improve the quality and efficiency of digital governance.

Third, unswervingly implement the strategy of expanding domestic demand. Prioritize stabilizing investment as a key focus, solidly carry out the planning, reserve, and implementation of major projects in the "14th Five-Year Plan," promote the accelerated construction of policy-funded projects such as "two heavy" projects, central budget investments, local government special bonds, and new policy financial tools, shift from "investment in objects" to "investment in people," enhance investment efficiency, and stimulate private investment vitality. Increase efforts to boost consumption, optimize and implement the policy of replacing old consumer goods with new ones, promote the quality and expansion of service consumption to benefit the public, accelerate the relaxation of unreasonable consumption restrictions, and enhance the quality and upgrading of consumption supply.

Fourth, further comprehensively deepen reform and expand opening up. Deeply promote integration into the construction of a national unified market, increase efforts to eliminate barriers, and collaboratively advance the integrated reform of "access, scenarios, and factors." Accelerate the creation of a first-class business environment, standardize investment attraction behavior, and deepen the systematic rectification of prominent issues in the bidding field. Promote the healthy development of the private economy, implement the Private Economy Promotion Law, improve long-term mechanisms related to enterprise law enforcement, and continuously boost development confidence. Steadily expand institutional opening up, stabilize the fundamentals of foreign trade and foreign investment, and coordinate the promotion of high-quality development in the "Maritime Silk Road" core area.

Fifth, accelerate the construction of a cross-strait integrated development demonstration zone. Improve the policy mechanism for Fujian-Taiwan integration, optimize industrial layout, deepen economic and trade cooperation, promote win-win cooperation between Fujian and Taiwan industries, support key areas to take the lead in integration, explore the establishment of a pilot area for a common market across the strait, and build a new pattern of all-round integrated development.

Sixth, promote regional coordinated development and urban-rural integration development. Deeply advance cooperation between mountains and seas in the new era, accelerate the revitalization and development of revolutionary old areas, solidly carry out assistance work for Tibet and Xinjiang, and deepen and expand cooperation between Fujian and Ningxia. Steadily promote new-type urbanization construction, advance provincial urban-rural integration pilot work, accelerate the implementation of new-type urbanization strategies, and continuously develop and strengthen the county economy. Build a higher-level "Maritime Fujian," strengthen, optimize, and expand the marine industry, and ensure the construction of national marine economic development demonstration zones in Fuzhou and Xiamen, enhancing the level of "digital ocean" construction.

Seventh, accelerate the comprehensive green transformation of economic and social development. Steadily implement the dual control system for total carbon emissions and intensity, support the construction of national and provincial carbon peak pilot projects, and accelerate the cultivation and construction of a number of zero-carbon parks. Deepen the reform and innovation of the ecological civilization system, continuously deepen the construction of five provincial-level ecological product value realization pilot projects, improve the waste recycling system, and continuously increase the publicity efforts for ecological civilization.

Eighth, continuously increase efforts to guarantee and improve people's livelihoods. Effectively carry out employment stabilization work, strengthen coordination with major labor input areas, and enhance employment services and rights protection for new employment forms. Strengthen the livelihood orientation of price reform, enhance analysis and judgment of CPI and PPI trends, continuously promote public utility price reform, and ensure a solid bottom line for livelihood prices.

Ninth, adapt to changes in population dynamics and optimize public resource allocation. Plan and promote high-quality population development, accelerate the improvement of public resource allocation mechanisms that adapt to population changes, and strengthen the forward-looking layout of educational resources.

Tenth, coordinate high-quality development and high-level security. Pay more attention to the coordination of development and security, continuously improve food security guarantee capabilities, solidly ensure energy element security, enhance the resilience of industrial and supply chains, and strengthen national defense mobilization capacity building.

The conference called for focusing on key tasks at the end of the year and the beginning of the next, ensuring safety in production, closely monitoring key areas and industries, strengthening the investigation and management of major accident hazards and safety risk prevention and resolution, tightening and solidifying the responsibility chain, and building a solid safety barrier. Ensure the completion of key projects, guarantee the quantity and price stability of important livelihood goods, especially daily necessities. Organize and coordinate the Spring Festival transportation work, address issues such as wage arrears for migrant workers and overdue payments to enterprises, maintain social harmony and stability, and ensure a safe, clean, and peaceful holiday.

The conference required the development and reform system of the province to unite more closely around the Party Central Committee with Comrade Xi Jinping at its core, deeply study and implement Xi Jinping's Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, resolutely implement the important speeches and instructions of General Secretary Xi Jinping, and take practical actions to firmly support the "two establishments" and resolutely achieve the "two safeguards." It is necessary to deeply understand the strategic intentions of the Party Central Committee and the work requirements of the Provincial Party Committee and Provincial Government, establish and practice a correct view of political achievements, consolidate and expand the educational results of deeply implementing the spirit of the Central Eight Regulations, promote the normalization and long-term effectiveness of work style construction, be enterprising and innovative, stay focused on goals, maintain a consistent blueprint, and open up a new situation for the development and reform work of the province, making new and greater contributions to the vigorous promotion of the practice of Chinese-style modernization in Fujian.

Members of the Party Leadership Group and departmental leaders of the Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Commission, chief planner, disciplinary inspection and supervision team stationed at the commission, relevant responsible comrades from various departments and affiliated units of the Fujian Provincial Development and Reform Commission, as well as main responsible comrades from the Development and Reform Commissions of various municipalities and the Economic Development Bureau of the Pingtan Comprehensive Experimental Zone, and key responsible persons from the Comprehensive Division, Planning Division, and Investment Division, along with relevant responsible comrades from departments such as industry and information technology, agriculture and rural affairs, grain and material reserves, and data management from some cities, attended the meeting.

title: National Development and Reform Commission Issues Plan for Green Transformation in Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart
description: The National Development and Reform Commission issued a Plan to accelerate green transformation in the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart, approved by the State Council. This initiative aims to enhance ecological protection and promote sustainable development in the region.

key_points.details: The Plan emphasizes exploring new models for green transformation in the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart, enhancing ecological and industrial integration.
Key tasks include coordinating ecology with production to strengthen industrial support, particularly in ecological industries and renewable energy.
The Plan promotes regional collaboration in ecological governance and industrial innovation, aiming for a sustainable and resilient urban-rural integration.

full_content.analysis: The 'Implementation Plan for Accelerating Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart' represents a strategic initiative aimed at fostering ecological sustainability and industrial innovation in Hunan Province. By integrating ecological preservation with industrial growth, the Plan seeks to establish the Green Heart as a model for urban-rural collaboration and resilience. Key tasks outlined in the Plan, such as enhancing green infrastructure and promoting alternative energy sources, underscore the commitment to a sustainable future. The collaborative governance approach will facilitate the sharing of best practices and resources, ensuring that the Green Heart not only meets local needs but also serves as a benchmark for similar initiatives nationwide.

chinese_original:
为支持长株潭生态绿心（以下简称“绿心”）探索绿色转型发展新模式，经国务院同意，近日，国家发展改革委印发了《长株潭生态绿心加快绿色转型发展实施方案》（发改环资〔2025〕1751号，以下简称《方案》）。国家发展改革委有关负责同志就《方案》有关情况回答了记者的提问。
问：《方案》出台的背景是什么？
答：
绿心位于湖南省长沙、株洲、湘潭三市交汇地带，涵盖各类自然要素，承载生态、生产、生活和安全韧性、区域融合等多元功能，是长株潭都市圈的生态枢纽和融城中心。2011年，习近平总书记在考察湖南时指出，“建立生态绿心，是保值增值的”、“50年后将在全国、全世界都有重要影响”。为抓好贯彻落实，湖南省制定出台了一系列法律法规、规划计划、政策举措等，全面加强、协同推进长株潭生态绿心生态环境保护和高质量发展，取得了积极成效。2022年，我委批复湖南省人民政府印发《长株潭都市圈发展规划》，提出要“建成具有世界影响的都市圈生态绿心”。2024年，国务院印发《新时代推动中部地区加快崛起的若干政策措施》，要求“支持长株潭生态绿心探索绿色转型发展新模式”。为贯彻落实党中央、国务院决策部署，2025年，我委会同湖南省在充分总结绿心发展经验模式基础上，对绿心加快绿色转型发展面临的新形势新问题进行了深入调研，起草并报经国务院同意，印发了《方案》，对支持长株潭生态绿心探索绿色转型发展新模式作出系统部署。
问：绿心探索绿色转型发展新模式的基础和优势都有哪些？
答：
绿心地理区位独特、生态要素齐全、产业科创条件良好，具备探索绿色转型发展新模式的基础和优势。
一是地理区位独特，具备探索绿色转型新模式的天然本底。
绿心连通武陵—雪峰山系和罗霄—幕阜山系的八条山脉，汇合七条水系后注入湘江，山水林田湖草沙（洲）要素俱全，蓝绿空间占比达79.70%。绿心距长株潭三市主城区20公里以内，面积529.79平方公里，涉及10个县（市、区）、21个乡镇（街道）和106个行政村（社区、林场），城乡交错融合，平均开发强度14.24%，是探索跨行政区域协同治理和城乡融合制度创新的良好样本。
二是实践探索较早，具备推进绿色转型发展的制度基础。
2007年，长株潭城市群开展“资源节约型和环境友好型”社会综合配套改革试验，将保护生态绿心作为重要任务。2011年，湖南省出台绿心规划，并于2013年起实施绿心保护条例，建立了绿心地区建设项目准入管理制度和省市区三级生态补偿机制，形成了一套严密的绿心保护制度框架，在高速城镇化阶段守住了一片绿地，留白了一片生态发展空间。根据绿色发展新形势新要求，湖南省已重构了绿心保护的制度框架，新版条例、规划已分别于2024年9月、2025年3月颁布实施，在从严保护的基础上，更加强调绿色转型，更好统筹高水平保护和高质量发展。
三是科创产业资源丰富，具备发展新质生产力的要素支撑。
绿心及周边地区是湖南发展先进制造业、推进科技创新、实施高水平开放的重点区域，布局了一批科创和产业平台，包括长株潭国家自主创新示范区、湖南湘江新区、中国（湖南）自由贸易试验区、中非经贸深度合作先行区、国家医学中心等国家重要平台，包含7个国家级重点实验室、9个院士工作站、22所高校和2个职教城，同时还有9个产业园区和保税区、5个国家级制造业单项冠军、177家专精特新企业、687家国家级高新技术企业集聚发展。
问：加快绿心绿色转型发展，要重点开展哪些工作？
答：
《方案》提出了4个方面重点任务：
第一，统筹生态与安全，厚植绿心绿色底色。
改善绿心生态环境，加强大气环境保护与治理、“三水统筹”治理、固体废弃物综合治理。提升绿心生态品质，实施重大生态工程，深入推进土地综合整治，强化生物多样性保护。增强绿心安全韧性，完善绿心生态安全格局，大力推进韧性城市建设。
第二，统筹生态与生产，强化绿心产业支撑。
大力发展生态产业，提升生态农林产业，发展生态文旅产业。加快产业绿色转型，强化技术创新引领，推动产业数智赋能，培育壮大未来产业。
第三，统筹生态与生活，促进绿心提质惠民。
完善绿色基础设施，构建绿色交通体系，加快发展绿色能源，健全环境基础设施。推动城乡绿色发展，大力推广绿色建筑，推进和美乡村建设。推广绿色生活方式，倡导绿色出行，鼓励公众参与。
第四，探索绿色转型发展新模式。
强化区域协同，包括组织管理协同、生态治理协同、产业创新协同。健全生态产品价值实现机制，夯实核算基础，强化经营开发，完善生态补偿。完善要素保障制度，加大资金支持力度，加强人才供给保障。
问：请问如何推动《方案》落实落地？
答：
《方案》的落实落地需要各有关方面共同努力，我委将坚持部门协同、上下联动，重点抓好以下工作：
一是加强组织协调。
我委将会同国务院有关部门加大对绿心加快绿色转型发展的指导支持力度，跟踪调度《方案》实施进展情况，帮助地方协调解决遇到的困难和问题。
二是抓好贯彻落实。
湖南省人民政府要切实承担主体责任，加强对绿心加快绿色转型发展的组织领导，细化政策措施，压实工作责任，确保《方案》各项任务落实落地，高标准、高质量推进绿心保护发展。
三是营造良好氛围。
我委将积极总结绿心加快绿色转型发展的先进做法和典型经验，并及时向全国宣传推广。
english_translation:
To support the exploration of new models for green transformation and development in the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart (hereinafter referred to as "Green Heart"), and with the approval of the State Council, the National Development and Reform Commission recently issued the "Implementation Plan for Accelerating Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart" (Document No. 发改环资〔2025〕1751, hereinafter referred to as the "Plan"). Relevant officials from the National Development and Reform Commission answered reporters' questions regarding the Plan.

Question: What is the background for the issuance of the Plan?
Answer:
The Green Heart is located at the junction of Changsha, Zhuzhou, and Xiangtan cities in Hunan Province, encompassing various natural elements and carrying multiple functions such as ecology, production, living, safety resilience, and regional integration. It serves as the ecological hub and integration center of the Chang-Zhu-Tan metropolitan area. In 2011, General Secretary Xi Jinping pointed out during his inspection of Hunan that "establishing the ecological green heart is a way to preserve and increase value" and that "it will have significant influence nationwide and globally in 50 years." To ensure effective implementation, Hunan Province has formulated a series of laws, regulations, plans, and policies to comprehensively strengthen and collaboratively promote ecological environment protection and high-quality development in the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart, achieving positive results. In 2022, our commission approved the Hunan Provincial Government's issuance of the "Development Plan for the Chang-Zhu-Tan Metropolitan Area," which proposed to "build an ecological green heart of the metropolitan area with global influence." In 2024, the State Council issued "Several Policy Measures to Promote the Accelerated Rise of the Central Region in the New Era," which called for "supporting the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart in exploring new models for green transformation and development." To implement the decisions and deployments of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and the State Council, in 2025, our commission, in conjunction with Hunan Province, conducted in-depth research on the new situations and problems faced by the Green Heart in accelerating green transformation and development, based on a comprehensive summary of the development experience and models of the Green Heart, drafted and submitted for State Council approval, and issued the Plan, which systematically deploys support for the exploration of new models for green transformation and development in the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart.

Question: What are the foundations and advantages for the Green Heart to explore new models for green transformation and development?
Answer:
The Green Heart has a unique geographical location, complete ecological elements, and favorable conditions for industrial and technological innovation, providing a foundation and advantages for exploring new models for green transformation and development.
First, the unique geographical location provides a natural basis for exploring new models for green transformation.
The Green Heart connects eight mountain ranges of the Wuling-Xuefeng and Luoxiao-Mufu mountain systems, converging seven river systems that flow into the Xiang River. It encompasses all elements of mountains, waters, forests, fields, lakes, grasslands, and sands (islands), with blue and green spaces accounting for 79.70%. The Green Heart is within 20 kilometers of the main urban areas of the three cities of Changsha, Zhuzhou, and Xiangtan, covering an area of 529.79 square kilometers, involving 10 counties (cities, districts), 21 towns (streets), and 106 administrative villages (communities, forest farms). The urban-rural integration is interwoven, with an average development intensity of 14.24%, making it a good example for exploring collaborative governance across administrative regions and institutional innovation for urban-rural integration.
Second, early practical exploration provides an institutional foundation for promoting green transformation.
In 2007, the Chang-Zhu-Tan urban agglomeration launched a comprehensive reform experiment for a "resource-saving and environmentally friendly" society, making the protection of the ecological green heart an important task. In 2011, Hunan Province issued the Green Heart Plan, and in 2013, the Green Heart Protection Regulations were implemented, establishing a project admission management system for construction in the Green Heart area and a three-tier ecological compensation mechanism at the provincial, municipal, and district levels, forming a rigorous framework for Green Heart protection that preserved green spaces during a phase of rapid urbanization and left room for ecological development. In response to new requirements for green development, Hunan Province has restructured the institutional framework for Green Heart protection, with new regulations and plans issued in September 2024 and March 2025, respectively, emphasizing green transformation while ensuring strict protection, better coordinating high-level protection and high-quality development.
Third, abundant resources in scientific and technological innovation industries provide element support for developing new productive forces.
The Green Heart and surrounding areas are key regions for Hunan to develop advanced manufacturing, promote technological innovation, and implement high-level openness, with a number of scientific and technological innovation and industrial platforms established, including the Chang-Zhu-Tan National Independent Innovation Demonstration Zone, Hunan Xiangjiang New Area, China (Hunan) Pilot Free Trade Zone, China-Africa Economic and Trade Deep Cooperation Pilot Zone, and National Medical Center, among other important national platforms. These include seven national key laboratories, nine academician workstations, 22 universities, and two vocational education cities, as well as nine industrial parks and bonded zones, five national-level manufacturing champions, 177 specialized and innovative enterprises, and 687 national-level high-tech enterprises clustered for development.

Question: What key tasks should be prioritized to accelerate the green transformation and development of the Green Heart?
Answer:
The Plan outlines four key tasks:
First, coordinate ecology and safety to deepen the green foundation of the Green Heart.
Improve the ecological environment of the Green Heart, strengthen air quality protection and governance, implement "three water coordination" governance, and comprehensively manage solid waste. Enhance the ecological quality of the Green Heart, implement major ecological projects, advance comprehensive land remediation, and strengthen biodiversity protection. Increase the safety resilience of the Green Heart, improve the ecological safety pattern, and vigorously promote resilient city construction.
Second, coordinate ecology and production to strengthen industrial support for the Green Heart.
Vigorously develop ecological industries, enhance ecological agriculture and forestry, and develop ecological cultural tourism industries. Accelerate the green transformation of industries, strengthen technological innovation leadership, promote digital empowerment of industries, and cultivate and expand future industries.
Third, coordinate ecology and living to enhance quality of life in the Green Heart.
Improve green infrastructure, build a green transportation system, accelerate the development of green energy, and enhance environmental infrastructure. Promote green development in urban and rural areas, vigorously advocate for green buildings, and advance the construction of beautiful rural areas. Promote green lifestyles, advocate for green travel, and encourage public participation.
Fourth, explore new models for green transformation and development.
Strengthen regional collaboration, including organizational management collaboration, ecological governance collaboration, and industrial innovation collaboration. Improve the mechanism for realizing the value of ecological products, solidify the accounting foundation, strengthen operational development, and enhance ecological compensation. Perfect the element guarantee system, increase financial support, and strengthen talent supply guarantees.

Question: How can the implementation of the Plan be promoted?
Answer:
The implementation of the Plan requires joint efforts from all relevant parties. Our commission will adhere to departmental collaboration and vertical coordination, focusing on the following tasks:
First, strengthen organizational coordination.
Our commission will work with relevant departments of the State Council to enhance guidance and support for the Green Heart's accelerated green transformation, track the implementation progress of the Plan, and assist localities in coordinating and resolving difficulties and issues encountered.
Second, ensure effective implementation.
The Hunan Provincial Government must take on the main responsibility, strengthen organizational leadership for the Green Heart's accelerated green transformation, refine policy measures, solidify work responsibilities, and ensure that all tasks of the Plan are implemented effectively, promoting the protection and development of the Green Heart to high standards and quality.
Third, create a favorable atmosphere.
Our commission will actively summarize advanced practices and exemplary experiences in the Green Heart's accelerated green transformation and promote them nationwide in a timely manner.

impact_analysis.details: The Plan's focus on green transformation will likely boost the development of alternative electricity sources, enhancing energy sustainability.
By promoting ecological industries, the Plan may increase the adoption of alternative fuels, contributing to reduced carbon emissions in the region.
The emphasis on technological innovation and green infrastructure will likely drive demand for renewable energy equipment in the Green Heart area.

title: National Development and Reform Commission Issues Green Transformation Plan for Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart
description: The National Development and Reform Commission approved a plan to accelerate the green transformation of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart, focusing on regional development, urban-rural integration, and ecological protection to enhance living conditions and promote sustainable growth.

key_points.details: The Plan emphasizes the importance of ecological protection in the Chang-Zhu-Tan region, ensuring the integrity of core ecological spaces while promoting urban-rural integration.
By leveraging local resources, the Plan aims to cultivate high-tech and eco-friendly industries, transforming ecological advantages into economic growth opportunities.

full_content.analysis: The 'Implementation Plan for Accelerating the Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart' outlines a strategic approach to enhance ecological integrity while fostering economic growth. chinese_original:
近日，经国务院同意，国家发展改革委印发了《长株潭生态绿心加快绿色转型发展实施方案》（发改环资〔2025〕1751号，以下简称《方案》），明确了长株潭生态绿心（以下简称“绿心”）绿色转型发展的总体目标、转型路径、机制保障等一系列内容。绿心位于长株潭都市圈的核心地区，其绿色转型不仅局限于绿心地区的生态提升，而是从更大尺度、更宽视野统筹区域发展与城乡融合，推动绿心绿色转型与都市圈高质量发展同频共振。
一、统筹区域发展，推进都市圈同城化
为推动绿心与三市深度有机衔接，《方案》立足区域视角、强化全域统筹，推动绿心更好地发挥“融城中心”作用。
一是强化核心生态空间整体保护。
长株潭生态绿心是连通东西向武陵—雪峰山脉与罗霄—幕连九山脉廊道和南北向南岭—洞庭湖廊道的交汇点，是区域生态格局的关键节点，对湘中地区生态系统的完整性与稳定性具有重要作用。为强化核心生态空间整体保护，《方案》提出要守牢生态保护红线，通过保持山系衔接、促进水脉联通、优化蓝绿网络，推动绿心与区域生态廊道深度融合，形成全域贯通的生态网络，筑牢区域生态安全格局。
二是促进功能布局协同联动。
立足绿心与三市资源禀赋，《方案》提出推动形成产业联动、协同共赢的功能布局。依托长沙丰富的科创资源、株洲与湘潭雄厚的先进制造基础，充分发挥绿心生态优势，重点培育科技创新、绿色智能计算、生命科技、生物制造、大健康、人工智能等高科技产业，以及生态文旅、体育健康、特色农林等生态友好型产业，将绿心生态优势转化为高质量发展优势。同时，充分发挥绿心地区作为“天然试验场”的独特价值，打造绿色技术的多元应用场景，为都市圈绿色转型注入持续动能。
三是打造一体互联的基础设施体系。
基础设施互联互通是推动绿心与三市高效融合的关键支撑。《方案》聚焦交通、市政、智慧化等核心领域，构建全域贯通、高效协同的基础设施网络，让人才、资源等各类要素的跨区域往来更便捷高效。交通方面，以“轨道上的长株潭”建设为抓手，实现绿心地区和长株潭轨道交通网络的高效衔接。市政方面，推进“地下一张网”建设，统筹绿心与周边区域的供水、排水、燃气、电力等管网规划建设，推进城镇排水管网建管养一体化。智慧化方面，建设“云上一张网”，完善5G网络覆盖，推动基础设施数字化、智能化发展。
二、促进城乡融合，打造品质宜居家园
绿心是数十万居民生活安居的家园，长期以来，绿心地区面临公共服务不够完善、人居环境品质不高等问题。《方案》聚焦人民福祉、强化民生保障，将绿心打造为品质宜居的幸福家园。
一是促进城乡公共服务均等化。
公共服务是保障民生福祉的核心载体。当前绿心地区虽基本形成了“镇—村（社区）”两级公共服务体系，但设施不够完善、品质不高仍是亟待补齐的短板。推进绿心地区城乡融合发展，必须把均衡优质的公共服务作为关键抓手。《方案》聚焦群众急难愁盼，推动教育、医疗、养老等城乡基本公共服务普惠共享，缩小城乡服务资源配置差距，不断增强优质公共服务的均衡性和可及性，让绿心地区农村居民与城市居民享有同等水平的优质服务。
二是提升城乡人居环境品质。
围绕长株潭“美丽绿心”建设，《方案》聚焦生态环境治理与城乡建设转型等提出了系列举措。生态治理方面，通过精准治污、生态修复等手段，系统改善都市圈大气环境、水环境、热环境、土壤质量，让绿心生态本底更加洁净宜居。城乡建设方面，着力推动建设方式绿色转型，通过全面推进既有建筑绿色化改造，严格落实建筑节能标准，大力发展装配式建筑，深入开展村容村貌整治和美丽乡村建设，不断提升城乡人居环境品质与绿色发展水平，打造生态宜居、低碳舒适的幸福家园。
三是推动城乡生产生活方式绿色转型。
《方案》以全域绿色低碳为导向，将绿色理念深度融入生产生活各场景，多措并举引导城乡居民形成简约适度、绿色低碳的行为习惯。出行方面大力倡导绿色理念，优化公共交通网络布局，完善步行、自行车等慢行系统配套，为公众选择低碳出行提供便利，减少交通碳排放。资源使用方面引导公众节约用水用电，鼓励使用节能家电、环保家具和绿色建材等绿色产品。废弃物处置方面因地制宜加强农村生活污水治理，全面推行垃圾分类，强化垃圾资源化利用，降低环境影响。
三、创新协同治理，健全共建共享机制
绿心绿色转型是跨区域、系统性的综合工程，必须凝聚三市合力，打破行政壁垒、整合资源要素。《方案》通过构建多维度协同机制，实现区域治理“一盘棋”。
一是加强规划协同。
要充分发挥规划对绿心高水平保护与高质量发展的统筹引领作用。一方面，加快建立健全绿心地区规划体系，发挥发展规划战略导向作用，强化国土空间规划基础作用，增强专项规划实施支撑作用，让绿心保护有“规”可依、发展有“章”可循。另一方面，深化绿心地区规划与周边区域规划的衔接协同，推动绿心规划与长株潭三市国土空间规划、都市圈一体化发展规划、行动计划等深度融合，统一规划标准、衔接空间布局、对齐发展时序，确保生态保护、产业布局、基础设施建设等步调一致。
二是加强重点领域协同。
生态共保方面，深化跨区域生态治理联动，探索建立多元化生态补偿机制，通过资金支付、对口协作、产业转移、人才培训、产业园区共建等多元路径，平衡生态保护责任与发展权益，让绿心保护者与周边受益者共享生态红利。产业共建方面，打破行政区划界线，鼓励采用一区多园、合作共建、产业飞地、异地孵化等模式，搭建跨区域产业创新协同平台，推动创新链、产业链、供应链深度融合，提升区域产业整体竞争力。设施统筹方面，建立城乡基础设施一体化规划、建设、管护机制，降低重复建设成本，扩大设施服务覆盖范围，实现资源共享、高效利用。
三是加强实施协同。
绿心绿色转型发展非一日之功，需循序渐进、持续发力。《方案》立足区域发展实际，选择湘江两岸、三市交界等基础条件优越、协同潜力突出的区域作为重点片区，布局生态保护修复、绿色产业培育、基础设施联通等项目，在规划选址、土地供应和资金安排等方面给予优先保障，同时建立完善跨行政区项目统筹推进机制和激励机制，推动重点片区出成效、作示范。在此基础上，要秉持“一茬接着一茬干”的韧劲，推动绿心绿色转型从局部试点走向全面开花，实现高水平保护与高质量发展的长期协同共进，绘就绿心绿色转型发展新画卷。
（郑德高 中国城市规划设计研究院副院长）
english_translation:
Recently, with the approval of the State Council, the National Development and Reform Commission issued the "Implementation Plan for Accelerating the Green Transformation and Development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart" (Document No. 发改环资〔2025〕1751号, hereinafter referred to as the "Plan"), which clarifies a series of contents including the overall goals, transformation paths, and mechanism guarantees for the green transformation and development of the Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart (hereinafter referred to as "Green Heart"). The Green Heart is located in the core area of the Chang-Zhu-Tan metropolitan area, and its green transformation is not limited to ecological enhancement in the Green Heart region but aims to coordinate regional development and urban-rural integration from a larger scale and broader perspective, promoting the synchronous resonance of the Green Heart's green transformation with the high-quality development of the metropolitan area.

I. Coordinating Regional Development and Promoting Urban Integration of the Metropolitan Area
To promote the deep and organic connection between the Green Heart and the three cities, the Plan focuses on a regional perspective and strengthens overall coordination, enabling the Green Heart to better play its role as the "integration center."

1. Strengthening the overall protection of core ecological spaces.
The Chang-Zhu-Tan Ecological Green Heart is the intersection point connecting the east-west Wuling-Xuefeng Mountain range and the Luoxiao-Mulianjiu Mountain range corridor, as well as the north-south Nanling-Dongting Lake corridor. It is a key node in the regional ecological pattern and plays an important role in the integrity and stability of the ecosystem in the central Hunan region. To strengthen the overall protection of core ecological spaces, the Plan proposes to firmly uphold the ecological protection red line by maintaining mountain system connectivity, promoting waterway connectivity, and optimizing the blue-green network, thus promoting the deep integration of the Green Heart with regional ecological corridors and forming a comprehensive ecological network that strengthens the regional ecological security pattern.

2. Promoting coordinated and interactive functional layout.
Based on the resource endowments of the Green Heart and the three cities, the Plan proposes to promote the formation of an industrial linkage and collaborative win-win functional layout. Leveraging Changsha's rich scientific and technological innovation resources and the strong advanced manufacturing foundation of Zhuzhou and Xiangtan, the ecological advantages of the Green Heart will be fully utilized to focus on cultivating high-tech industries such as technological innovation, green intelligent computing, life sciences, biomanufacturing, health care, and artificial intelligence, as well as eco-friendly industries like ecological tourism, sports health, and specialty agriculture and forestry, transforming the ecological advantages of the Green Heart into advantages for high-quality development. At the same time, the unique value of the Green Heart region as a "natural testing ground" will be fully utilized to create diverse application scenarios for green technologies, injecting continuous momentum into the green transformation of the metropolitan area.

3. Building an integrated and interconnected infrastructure system.
The interconnectivity of infrastructure is a key support for promoting the efficient integration of the Green Heart and the three cities. The Plan focuses on core areas such as transportation, municipal services, and smart technology, constructing a comprehensive, efficient, and coordinated infrastructure network that facilitates the cross-regional flow of talents, resources, and other elements. In terms of transportation, the construction of "Chang-Zhu-Tan on Rails" will be the focus to achieve efficient connectivity between the Green Heart region and the Chang-Zhu-Tan rail transit network. In terms of municipal services, the promotion of "a unified underground network" will coordinate the planning and construction of water supply, drainage, gas, and electricity networks in the Green Heart and surrounding areas, advancing the integrated management and maintenance of urban drainage networks. In terms of smart technology, the construction of "a unified cloud network" will enhance 5G network coverage and promote the digital and intelligent development of infrastructure.

II. Promoting Urban-Rural Integration and Creating a Quality, Livable Home
The Green Heart is the home for hundreds of thousands of residents. For a long time, the Green Heart region has faced issues such as inadequate public services and low quality of living environments. The Plan focuses on people's well-being and strengthens livelihood guarantees, aiming to create a quality, livable, and happy home in the Green Heart.

1. Promoting the equalization of urban and rural public services.
Public services are the core vehicle for ensuring the well-being of the people. Currently, although the Green Heart region has basically formed a two-level public service system of "town-village (community)," the facilities are still inadequate and of low quality, which remains a pressing shortcoming. Promoting urban-rural integrated development in the Green Heart must prioritize the provision of balanced and high-quality public services. The Plan focuses on the urgent needs of the public, promoting the inclusive sharing of basic public services such as education, healthcare, and elderly care, narrowing the gap in the allocation of service resources between urban and rural areas, and continuously enhancing the balance and accessibility of high-quality public services, ensuring that rural residents in the Green Heart enjoy the same level of quality services as urban residents.

2. Enhancing the quality of living environments in urban and rural areas.
In line with the construction of a "Beautiful Green Heart" in Chang-Zhu-Tan, the Plan proposes a series of measures focusing on ecological environment governance and the transformation of urban and rural construction. In terms of ecological governance, through precise pollution control and ecological restoration, the urban air, water, thermal environment, and soil quality will be systematically improved, making the ecological foundation of the Green Heart cleaner and more livable. In terms of urban and rural construction, efforts will focus on promoting the green transformation of construction methods, comprehensively advancing the green renovation of existing buildings, strictly implementing energy-saving standards for buildings, vigorously developing prefabricated buildings, and deeply carrying out village appearance improvement and beautiful countryside construction, continuously enhancing the quality of living environments and the level of green development in urban and rural areas, creating a happy home that is ecologically livable and low-carbon comfortable.

3. Promoting the green transformation of urban and rural production and lifestyle.
The Plan, guided by a comprehensive green and low-carbon approach, deeply integrates green concepts into various scenarios of production and life, employing multiple measures to guide urban and rural residents to form simple, moderate, green, and low-carbon behavioral habits. In terms of travel, it vigorously advocates green concepts, optimizes the layout of public transportation networks, and improves the supporting systems for walking and cycling, providing convenience for the public to choose low-carbon travel and reducing transportation carbon emissions. In terms of resource use, it guides the public to conserve water and electricity, encouraging the use of energy-saving appliances, environmentally friendly furniture, and green building materials. In terms of waste disposal, it strengthens the governance of rural domestic sewage according to local conditions, fully implements waste classification, enhances the resource utilization of waste, and reduces environmental impact.

III. Innovating Collaborative Governance and Improving the Co-construction and Sharing Mechanism
The green transformation of the Green Heart is a cross-regional, systematic comprehensive project that requires the concerted efforts of the three cities to break down administrative barriers and integrate resource elements. The Plan aims to achieve regional governance as "one chess game" through the establishment of a multi-dimensional collaborative mechanism.

1. Strengthening planning collaboration.
It is essential to fully leverage planning's role in coordinating the high-level protection and high-quality development of the Green Heart. On one hand, it is necessary to accelerate the establishment and improvement of the planning system for the Green Heart region, utilizing development planning for strategic guidance, reinforcing the foundational role of land spatial planning, and enhancing the supporting role of special planning implementation, ensuring that the protection of the Green Heart has "rules" to follow and development has "chapters" to adhere to. On the other hand, it is important to deepen the coordination and collaboration between the planning of the Green Heart region and the surrounding areas, promoting the deep integration of the Green Heart's planning with the land spatial planning of the three cities in Chang-Zhu-Tan, the integrated development planning of the metropolitan area, and action plans, unifying planning standards, coordinating spatial layouts, and aligning development timelines to ensure consistency in ecological protection, industrial layout, and infrastructure construction.

2. Strengthening collaboration in key areas.
In terms of ecological co-protection, it is necessary to deepen cross-regional ecological governance linkage and explore the establishment of a diversified ecological compensation mechanism, balancing ecological protection responsibilities and development rights through multiple pathways such as financial payments, counterpart cooperation, industrial transfer, talent training, and co-construction of industrial parks, allowing protectors of the Green Heart to share ecological dividends with surrounding beneficiaries. In terms of industrial co-construction, it is important to break down administrative boundaries, encouraging models such as one area with multiple parks, cooperative construction, industrial enclaves, and off-site incubation, building a cross-regional industrial innovation collaboration platform, promoting the deep integration of innovation chains, industrial chains, and supply chains, and enhancing the overall competitiveness of regional industries. In terms of infrastructure coordination, it is necessary to establish an integrated planning, construction, and management mechanism for urban and rural infrastructure, reducing the costs of redundant construction, expanding the coverage of infrastructure services, and achieving resource sharing and efficient utilization.

3. Strengthening implementation collaboration.
The green transformation and development of the Green Heart is not an overnight achievement; it requires gradual progress and sustained efforts. The Plan, based on the actual regional development, selects areas with superior foundational conditions and collaborative potential, such as the banks of the Xiang River and the borders of the three cities, as key zones for laying out projects related to ecological protection and restoration, green industry cultivation, and infrastructure connectivity, providing priority guarantees in terms of planning site selection, land supply, and funding arrangements. At the same time, it is essential to establish and improve a project coordination mechanism and incentive mechanism for cross-administrative regions, promoting key zones to achieve results and serve as models. On this basis, it is important to maintain the resilience of "one phase follows another," promoting the green transformation of the Green Heart from localized pilot projects to comprehensive flourishing, achieving long-term coordinated progress between high-level protection and high-quality development, and painting a new picture of the green transformation and development of the Green Heart.

(Zheng Degao, Vice President of the China Urban Planning and Design Institute)

impact_analysis.details: The Plan's focus on high-tech industries includes biotechnology, promoting innovation and development in this sector within the Green Heart region.
By enhancing public services, the Plan aims to improve health care access and quality for residents in the Green Heart, addressing existing disparities.
The Plan promotes green construction practices, aiming to improve building standards and environmental quality in urban and rural areas of the Green Heart.

title: Asset Management Association of China Deregisters Private Fund Managers in Gansu
description: The Asset Management Association of China has deregistered a list of private fund managers operating in the Gansu jurisdiction as of December 31, 2025.

key_points.details: The deregistration of private fund managers in Gansu indicates a tightening regulatory environment for asset management in China.
This action may lead to reduced competition in the asset management sector, potentially affecting investment options for local investors.
The move reflects ongoing efforts by Chinese authorities to enhance oversight and compliance within the financial sector.

full_content.analysis: The deregistration of private fund managers in Gansu by the Asset Management Association of China signifies a significant regulatory shift within the asset management landscape. This action, effective as of December 31, 2025, suggests a more stringent approach by Chinese regulators aimed at ensuring compliance and stability in the financial sector. The implications of this deregistration could lead to a decrease in competition among fund managers, which may limit investment choices for local investors. Furthermore, it underscores the broader trend of increasing oversight in China's financial markets, reflecting the government's commitment to enhancing regulatory frameworks and protecting investor interests.

title: China's Anti-Monopoly Committee Investigates Food Delivery Platform Competition
description: The Office of the State Council Anti-Monopoly and Anti-Unfair Competition Committee will investigate the market competition in the food delivery platform service industry due to concerns over subsidy wars and price competition affecting the economy.

key_points.details: The Committee Office aims to ensure fair competition in the food delivery platform industry, addressing issues like subsidy wars and price competition.
The investigation will involve on-site verification and stakeholder interviews to understand competitive behaviors and assess monopoly risks.
Food delivery platforms are urged to cooperate with the investigation, ensuring compliance with antitrust regulations to foster healthy market development.

full_content.analysis: The announcement by the Office of the State Council Anti-Monopoly and Anti-Unfair Competition Committee highlights the critical need for regulatory oversight in China's food delivery platform service industry. As this sector significantly contributes to the platform economy, the investigation aims to address growing concerns over unfair competition practices, such as aggressive subsidy wars and price undercutting. By conducting thorough assessments through interviews and surveys, the Committee seeks to gather insights from various stakeholders, including consumers and platform operators. This initiative not only aims to mitigate monopoly risks but also to promote a healthier competitive environment that encourages innovation and fair pricing, ultimately benefiting the broader economy.
